subcodes.first_line: O Tahir! We have heard thy call and have answered thee, and We have beheld thy turning unto Us. We have drawn nigh unto thee from this Station and have revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طاهر قد سمعنا ندآئک و اجبناک و راینا اقبالک اقبلنا الیک من هذا المقام و انزلنا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @call to action
